pathways.name: Swift Concurrency Maturity Path
pathways.description: Master the second-generation Swift concurrency model: Sendable, distributed actors, and the Async Algorithms package. Start with the Swift release overview, then dive deep into the data-race elimination model, and finish with practical patterns.

pathways.name: Swift Charts Path
pathways.description: Adopt Apple's brand-new declarative charting framework. Begin with the introduction, then advance to mark composition, plot styling, and interactive charts. Wraps up with the design lessons from Apple's evangelism team.

pathways.name: NavigationStack & Split View Migration Path
pathways.description: Migrate from the deprecated NavigationView APIs to the data-driven NavigationStack and NavigationSplitView. Learn the cookbook of recipes, then apply to multi-platform apps with proper state restoration and deep linking.

pathways.name: App Intents Foundation Path
pathways.description: Adopt the new App Intents framework to expose your app's functionality to Siri, Spotlight, Shortcuts, and Focus filters with zero user setup. Start with the deep dive, then add App Shortcuts, then wire up Focus filters.

pathways.name: Lock Screen Widgets & Complications Path
pathways.description: Build accessory widgets for iOS Lock Screen and unified complications for watchOS using a single WidgetKit codebase. Covers rendering modes, always-on display, and SwiftUI-only complications.

pathways.name: Passkeys & Modern Auth Path
pathways.description: Replace passwords with passkeys in your apps and websites. Covers the WebAuthn fundamentals, ASAuthorization API patterns for iOS, and JavaScript adoption for web.

pathways.name: App Performance & Launch Time Path
pathways.description: Systematically reduce app size and launch time. Covers the new linker options, dyld page-in linking, and runtime size wins from compiler/runtime improvements.

pathways.name: Hang Detection & Diagnosis Path
pathways.description: Discover, diagnose, and resolve hangs across the entire app lifecycle: at-desk with Thread Performance Checker, in beta with on-device hang detection, and in production via the Xcode Organizer.

pathways.name: Metal 3 & Modern Graphics Path
pathways.description: Adopt Metal 3 for AAA graphics on Apple silicon: fast resource loading, MetalFX upscaling, mesh shaders, ray tracing, and ML-accelerated post-processing. Designed for game engines and graphics-intensive apps.

pathways.name: ML on Apple Silicon Path
pathways.description: Train and run ML models on Apple silicon GPUs. Covers PyTorch's new MPS backend, TensorFlow custom ops, MPSGraph, and Vision framework's revision-3 ML-based detectors.

pathways.name: Desktop-Class iPad Path
pathways.description: Build productive iPad apps with the new desktop-class APIs: customizable navigation bars, find/replace, edit menus, multi-select tables, and toolbar customization. Pairs with Mac Catalyst improvements.

pathways.name: Background Tasks & Data Sync Path
pathways.description: Build apps that refresh data reliably in the background. Covers the unified SwiftUI BackgroundTask API, Background Assets framework for large downloads, Core Data + CloudKit observability, and schema migration.

pathways.name: Live Text & VisionKit Path
pathways.description: Add machine-readable code and live text capture to your apps using VisionKit's drop-in DataScannerViewController. Covers Vision framework revisions, image-analysis interactions, and accessibility integration.

pathways.name: SF Symbols 4 & Design Path
pathways.description: Adopt Variable Color, master the new automatic rendering mode, and design symbols/charts that adapt across rendering contexts. Covers SF Symbols engineering and the design counterparts for charts.
